entry.title: Re: ATC Check error - The SELECT command is executed on the database (SELECT 694)
entry.content: SELECT ##ITAB_DB_SELECT DI_CODE, COUNT( MATNR ) AS MATNR_COUNT FROM @LT_LIPS_MARA AS LIPS_MARA GROUP BY DI_CODE INTO TABLE @DATA(LT_SUMMARY).

entry.title: Re: TAN as higher level item category for Sales Order Typ...
entry.content: Hi Sam, According to my expert, it's not possible to achieve what you're asking in S/4HANA Cloud, and there is also no plan to support it in standard, and it couldn't be done via customer configuration. However, you can think about to try the sales kit functionality which is covered with scope item 31Q. Best Regards, Sean

entry.title: Re: Report layout not showing in BPC Add ins using with EPM
entry.content:
Please ask your local IT team install office 365. I think it will resolve the problem. Also check below setting.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: UI5 Tooling 4.0
entry.content:
UI5 Tooling 4.0

The UI5 Core team is pleased to announce the release of UI5 Tooling 4.0.

This release has a strong focus on enabling UI5 2.x compatibility for projects. In addition, we introduced a new feature for automatically generating locale information in the manifest.json. Along with some important housekeeping.

We are doing our best to minimize upgrade efforts for UI5 developers. Projects currently working with UI5 Tooling 3.x are generally expected to work with UI5 Tooling 4.0. More on this below.

Node.js and npm Requirements

UI5 Tooling 4.0 requires Node.js v20.11.0, v22.0.0, or higher.

This allows us to make use of the latest Node.js features and to upgrade dependencies requiring current Node.js versions.

Specification Version 4.0

This new major Specification Version comes with breaking changes that might have an impact on projects. Please carefully read the migration guide before applying the new version to your projects.

These changes are mostly related to how bundles are created in UI5 Tooling. Even if you do not use custom bundles, this might have an impact on the initial loading behavior of your application or library. These changes pave the road for future improvements on bundling in UI5. Stay tuned for more!

UI5 2.x

UI5 Tooling 4.0 along with the new Specification Version 4.0 is required for projects to utilize UI5 2.x.

When defining Specification Version 4.0 in your project, the code generated by UI5 Tooling will apply all the current best practices, such as consistently loading resources asynchronously and terminating the use of "eval()" (a common CSP violation). Both of which are prerequisites for projects to be compatible with UI5 2.x.

New Feature: Automatic Generation of Locale Information

In your application or library project, UI5 Tooling will now analyze existing manifest.json files. For any "i18n" and "ResourceModel" configurations, it will ensure that the "supportedLocales" property is defined. If it is not defined, it will be filled automatically based on the translation files present in the project.

This will improve user experience by avoiding unnecessary requests at runtime. Without a defined set of "supported locales", UI5 runtime has to determine the available translations by requesting individual files, often resulting in "404 Not Found" server responses.

Note that you can opt out of this behavior by defining the "supportedLocales" property yourself. The feature is active for both, the build and the server.

Learn more about this new feature in the builder documentation.

Upgrade Today

Upgrading to UI5 Tooling 4.0 is a straightforward task for most projects.

First, ensure you meet the minimum required versions of Node.js and npm using the commands "node --version" and "npm --version". Make sure to also check your CI/CD workflows.

Then upgrade the UI5 CLI in your project by executing the following command:

npm i --save-dev @ui5/cli@latest

Also update your global install using:

npm i --global @ui5/cli@latest

You may already stop there, since updating the Specification Version remains optional.

However, if you want UI5 Tooling to apply the current best practices when building your project, also update the "specVersion" property in all ui5.yaml files to "4.0": 

 

specVersion: "4.0"
[...]

 

Afterwards, test your project as usual. In case any problems come up, make sure to check our migration guide. And if you need further assistance, we invite you to raise an issue on GitHub.

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to...
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP

1. Please check and  make sure, the database user that used for upgrade process has privilege assigned according to the guide : https://help.sap.com/doc/4e7c047f2c9e4cbe97800ffaf7b68f8e/10.0/en-US/B1_for_SAP_HANA_Admin_Guide.pdf

Please make sure the database user has BACKUP ADMIN and BACKUP OPERATOR privilege and then try again.

Granting Roles and Privileges to Database Users follow steps as below:
- In the SAP HANA studio, connect to your system as a superuser (for example, SYSTEM).
- In the Administration Console, under the Security folder of your system, under Users, double-click the database user, then details of the database user get displayed on the right.
- In the right panel, add required roles or privileges.
- To apply the changes, click (Deploy) or press F 8

2. Please backup and remove SBO-COMMON database, attempt to upgrade again.
Also, you can install or upgrade only the SLD components and company database as first step(but not repository), and then, perform the steps detailed in the SAP NOTE 1455344 - How to Recreate the SBO-COMMON Database in SAP Business One to re-create the repository.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Customization IMG tree wiped out after 2023 FPS01 Upgrade
entry.content:
Hello all,

each time we have carried out a 2023 FPS01 upgrade, the customization tree gets wiped out, totally deleted, does anyone know why and how it can be prevented ?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA FUNDS MANAGEMENT-Part 2 (what’s in it for private owned Customers)
entry.content:
Dear @gianluca_taccone,

thanks for the document.

I have a question: in our case we load only the next year budget (as it's approved yearly), but for some OPEX, like maintenance, we have multi-year contracts.

So, let's say, in oct-2024 we got 2025's budget and in dec-2024 we signed a contract covering 2025-2027 (essentially, assuming we'll get enough budget the following years).

My client wants the budget to be checked only for 2025 (at least, till 2026 budget is approved and loaded).

I see different issues in this approach (mainly on purchase requests/purchase order level: how can the system know which period each line refers to? and if the same line covers different years?).

I was wondering if you ever had such a situation (timing in your 4th scenario is considered, but it assumes we have a multiyear budget, which we don't).

Your hints would be much appreciated.


Best

Marco

entry.title: Fiori App F2359 Error: Target was not found
entry.content:
When opening Fiori App F2359 an error come up:

Target was not found 

sap.ui.generic.app.navigation.service.NavigationHandler is not a constructor

 

OData-services + SICF services were checked....also in F12 DEV mode of MS Edge.

Do you have an idea?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Henning

entry.content: The former on is SE16, the latter SE16N

entry.title: Workflow Substitute - Is it possible to create a substitute for a single Workflow Task?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently when creating a Substitute via SBWP, the other user sees all tasks/items assigned to the original user the items are assigned to.

Is it possible to create a substitute, not for all tasks/items, but for one specific task only? if so, how can this be achieved?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Can a dismantling product order generate only raw materials and not consume finished products?
entry.content:
Hi, experts

Our company has some defective products, and we can dismantle these defective products and use some of the raw materials. I can manage them by creating disassembly product orders. Is it possible that the components of my dismantling product order can have only raw material output and no consumption of finished goods, as this part of the finished goods has already been scrapped. Will there be any impact on the financial side in particular?

entry.title: All transactions linked to a material in one app
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any application in public cloud which can give a list of all transactions (production orders, deliveries, Sales orders, order reservations etc) linked to a material? Something similar to customer 360 app but for a product?

We currently use MD04 but that's not easy to read and scroll through. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Is there an API Endpoint to attach a file to a specific quote?
entry.content: Hello, did you managed to solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Display of page map fails
entry.content: Hi Miguel, Thanks a lot for your comment. My application is indeed based on a OData V4 service. But all fiori tool packages are up-to-date (cf. screen copy in my original post). Also, there are are SAP e-Learnings out there where the page map works perfectly fine for fiori element apps based on ODate V4 services. The point is that the page map is supposed to facilitate the development and the maintenance of the fe front-end. So I really believe that the probleme I describe is due to a but. Best regards, Axel.

entry.title: Is there a way to schedule FBW4 / F-20 in background ?
entry.content:
Dear All

I am looking for a solution to reverse bill liability in background. I don't see how to do that with F-20 or FBW4.

Any idea?

Thanks for your help

BR

Julien

entry.title: How to configure different product cost estimation for different BOM version
entry.content:
Hi experts

could you please give me some suggestions on this scnario

for a bom item, I have already a BOM version which is used in production. the BOM usage is 1-production. now I want to create another BOM which is only used for cost estimation/forcast (not updating the current standard cost price) . 

how to setup in SAP to achive such requiremnt? thanks!

entry.title: Re: Display of page map fails
entry.content: @_axel_ ahh okay, yes i also have different Apps where the Page Map works perfectly fine for a OData V4 Service. And then for another App suddenly the Page map didn't work. The only different thing was the OData Service, so i thought that that must be the problem. Greetings, Miguel 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum

Certainly

Above is the result I get on SAC. As you can see some of the values are hidden. In every one of these hidden cells there's two or more values that are not identical so SAC hides them. I would like to somehow aggregate them in order for them to appear instead of adding more filters which would solve the problem but defeat the purpose of my story.

thank you for sharing your experience. Yes, I guess there is no way around using custom code. We will be using EA for reporting. Kind regards,

Max

entry.title: Re: How to Create Deeplinks by using Specific Tab URL in...
entry.content: Hi William Yu thanks a lot for your answer, it works.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Mechanisms for putting production order on ho...
entry.content:
Hello,


I believe this task can be addressed using the Production Process Designer and triggers.

For example, after a specific event occurs, you can initiate an order check and update the status if something is missing. By using a stock change trigger, you can check the order for which the movement was made and update the status accordingly. Another option is to run checks periodically to verify availability.

Best regards,
Ruslan

entry.title: Re: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
Hi @gaurav_setu ,  if you're MDK apps are deployed natively you can follow the blog by selecting No-System in the content manager. Only with this selection you will get the option to create the "Native Tiles" for iOS / Android leveraging the URL Scheme of your native app. 

Otherwise if you're calling webapps you can create "usual" tiles with a system and another UI technology. Those would also show on the Work Zone launchpad and will be available in SAP Mobile Start as well. 

Hope this helps! Best regards, 
Dennis

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content: LOEKZ does not change from what value to what value? (i.e. what value do you have before, what value do you expect after? What happens if you try to change it manually via ME22N? Did you check the many SAP notes about BAPI_PO_CHANGE and LOEKZ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

Thank you for this initiative.

I hold a BSc in Science (Mathematics). Currently I am a mid-career switcher and have been unemployed for more than a year.

I have been trying to apply to various tech jobs to no success. I am keen to learn more digital skills, in particular relating to the SAP ecosystem and I think this opportunity will be a great platform for me to start with.

Hope to hear from you soon.

Regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: Overview of SuccessFactors extensions on SAP Cloud Platform
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question and need some clarification. My company recently subscribed to the SuccessFactors Cloud, and it's not clear whether SAP will provide it as a two or three-system landscape deployment. After discussing it with the account manager and sales technical SF, they mentioned it would be only a two-system landscape. However, I have read in many blogs that the SF Cloud has three system landscapes.

Could you please provide some insight into this issue?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content: If you need my CDS code and annotations i'll be happy to provide what I can to solve this..

entry.title: Re: DMO with system move with shd rep on target DB
entry.content:
Hi Boris
Reg. SPDD and SPAU will be performed on Target server, hence co-file datafile and umodauto.lst will be generating /usr/sap/trans in target (we have different trans dir. in Azure and on-premises). 
 In Next system DMO, Sum will search SPDD and SPAU TR in source system /usr/sap/trans (source SUm configuration phase)
so do we need to copy PSDD and SPAU co-files, datafiles and umodauto.lst from target to source trans dir?

TR
K

entry.title: Is there a version of the Crystal Report Runtime which works on Tomcat 10.1 and Java 21?
entry.content:
I am in the process of upgrading our core application to run on updated libraries - specifically the latest LTS Java version (OpenJDK 21) along with Tomcat 10.1 - which includes the Jakarta library migration.

Part of our application contains an integration with SAP Crystal Reports for our reporting - and we host the SAP Crystal Reports viewer as part of this on the same Tomcat instance.

We are currently using the 2020 version, but after having a look at the options available, it seems all the ones I checked are reliant on javax classes (which are not available in the newer versions of Java given the Jakarta migration changes).

I have tried several versions of the Crystal Report Viewer - such as the 2020 build, and the latest runtime included in Crystal Report For Eclipse - both have the same errors about javax classes not being present - indicating that the Crystal Report Runtime seems to be still relying on javax.servlet - which is not part of Tomcat 10.1.

Downloads were from here: https://origin.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/site/index.html

Are there any versions of the Crystal Reports Runtime which work on the latest builds of Tomcat and Java, given it's EOL coming in the next few years?

Happy to switch runtimes if there is one released, it is quite possible I missed one if it exists as I am new here - but any advice would be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Pascal

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content: Still thinking about those additional questions.

entry.title: Data Source and Service Selection configuration in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hello,

I am doing the exercise Creating an analytical list page of the course "Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps". I don't know how to complete the Data Source and Service Selection in SAP Business Application Studio.

I've completed the previous exercises. According to the information provided in the Git repository, I am supposed to get "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial" as an option for "System":

 

Based on the information provided in the Git repository, I assume this option means connecting to the back end I've used earlier in this course. In Eclipse, I needed to provide a service key and to log in to connect the back end, in VSCode, I needed only to provide a service key, and in SAP BAS, I don't see a possibility to provide a service key.

Why do I not get the option "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial" for "System"?

Best regards,

Alexander Schädlich

entry.title: Re: Authority Check-For Cost Center Based on User name
entry.content:
So much wrong here, I barely know where to start.

But a few things that will prevent your code from doing what it probably should:

  • you read your custom table with user and cost center number - but the variable lv_cs is not filled anywhere
  • you do an authority check on an authorization object named z_cs_auth - does that actually exist? If it does, you will need to pass it to the function authority_check in upper case. (Or, better: just directly use the ABAP statement AUTHORITY-CHECK, rather than going through the function.)

And please, when you post code, do post it formatted as code. Like this it's really hard to read.

entry.title: Re: Sending HU information to S/4 Delivery after Packing from SAP EWM- A workaround Solution
entry.content:
@manuel_g We have a similar requirement, wanted to check on your latest comment if you were able to perform the PPF to trigger HU's using the new status, 'Ready for Shipping'?

I have release S/42023 FPS00, so I probably should have this functionality available in the system.

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content: Unfortunately I cannot see any headline, nor the currency ... but my assumption is that some values are not displayed due to different currencies, which cannot be aggregated. If you drill-down the currency, how does the result look then?

entry.title: Sales Order Simulate API
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are using Sales order simulate (A2X API) for performing the availability check. This API returns the final confirmed delivery date of the schedule line. I'm looking for the underlying dates in the schedule line, ex: Material availability data, Loading date, Transit time. Is there any way to achieve this during the Simulate Process. I couldnt find any documentation related to this. 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Use Action Buttons in Operation Activity List plugin in PODs
entry.content:
Manoel I was curious if there is a way to share your amazing PODs in order to use them in our tenant.

Event better if SAP provide a "POD Marketplace'

entry.title: Re: Empty Adobe form when called from an application program
entry.content:
Hello,

You can use the debugger to extract the XFD.xml file. This is the input data that is sent to the ADS to generate the output. If this is already empty, you should further check your application site. If this is correct, the form could be the issue.

For more information:
KBA 2359874 - How to collect PDF data during generation runtime? [VIDEO]
https://me.sap.com/notes/2359874

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Your first service and first endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&qu
entry.content: That's allowed! 🙂 Have fun.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: BTW are you still stuck? Let us know, and if so, also provide a bit more info on what you were doing when you got the "Expected ..." error. Good luck!

entry.title: Re: Configuring Certificate Lifecycle Management
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog, it gave me a good start. We have CLM for ABAP working now on our environment signing with a Remote CA.

We had a couple of issues with permissions on the certificate templates on Microsoft side but all got resolved.

We have the report SSF_CERT_RENEW running once a month with 20 days variant.

On to the Java systems config now. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content:
Ok, if you don't have currencies, then it is probably still a matter of annotations on the key figures... see this example: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361382991.html

here you can see:

@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
seatsocc as NumberOfOccupiedSeats

Do you have the same above your key figure (I cannot see the Name)?

@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
<YOUR KEY FIGURE>

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"

entry.title: Re: New Learning Journey for SAP Master Data Governance for Beginners
entry.content:
@habeebrehan

Central governance is planned to come with SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition, master data governance (according to SAP Roadmap Explorer). Also, more domains are planned for SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition (according to SAP Roadmap Explorer).

entry.title: Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently unable to access the provided exercises for "Practicing Clean Core Extensibility for SAP S4/HANA Cloud".

Each time I try to open the exercises, I encounter an internal error. (Internal error message is attached below).

For example, the following exercises (among others) could not be loaded:

  • Collect Usage Data using the ABAP Call Monitor
  • Create a UX using SAP Build Apps
  • Specify a Migration Scope using the Custom Code Migration App
  • Explore ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Objects
  • Utilize the SAP Business Accelerator Hub
  • ......

I would appreciate it if you could investigate the issue. Please let me know if there are any updates or if there is an estimated time for resolving this problem.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Hi there - can you supply more info. When does the sqlite error occur, what are you requesting? It's hard to guess what the problem might be without this sort of info. Is the service (in CF) available publicly, and if so, what is the URL (so we can check)? Cheers!

entry.title: Re: S/4 Public Cloud CBC:Event-Based Revenue Recognition...
entry.content:
Hi, 

just a quick update regarding your question: With the SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 release, an automatic imminent loss handling process is available for EPPM projects. To learn more, see Loss Handling with Event-Based Revenue Recognition.

I hope that helps! 

Kind regards, 

Janina

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Hello DJ @qmacro ,

Here is my observation.

1. Calling the entity with  Key-as-Segmen is possible in CAP, as it is supporting oData v4 out-of the box.

2 To read just the scalar values, we can use the $value get the data.

odata/v4/northbreeze/Products/11/Category/CategoryName/$value

entry.content: Excellent, well done!

entry.title: Re: J2EE Instance does not start while while installing N...
entry.content: Now, after a few Days i finally found a Solution by myself. It was just to use another Java Components Package, even if i already tried a few of them. For the Netweaver 7.5 you have to use the 'SAP Netweaver 7.5 SP22 Java' Package and not the 'NW 7.5 Java based SW Comp.s 1/2 + 2/2'. Sadly there was given a wrong directory in the installation, so you couldnt see this right away.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: That's very odd - can you share your code / project?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content: This is what I have on my consumption view

entry.title: Purchase Order, creation of conditions record
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

as part of my project (on S/4HANA) I need to create record conditions (MEK1) but I find that this subject is not very clear, particularly the technical resolution.

I cannot use the BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS FM because it has a not Released status, then I wanted to use the RV_CONDITION_COPY/RV_CONDITION_MAINTENANCE... FMs but once again these FMs are not released.

Then I came across the CL_PURGPRCG_CNDNRECORD_API class which seems to correspond to my needs but there is very little information on this class, there is just a blog (thanks to the author) but not very precise in my opinion, moreover why there is no class level documentation?

Finally there is the OData service API_PURGPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV which also seems to correspond but I wonder about the relevance of using this service for performance reasons (wrongly?), moreover it is not even activated in my system .

In short, I am lost in the technical path to take, thanks in advance to all those who are willing to guide me through this labyrinth 🙂

entry.title: Inventory Reconciliation S/4HANA Cloud and 3 Party Warehouse Management
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where we need the inventory to be updated in S4HC based on the stock status in 3rd party warehouse. My S4HC is integrated with 3PL warehouse provider. The source system is the 3rd Party WM system.

Is there a standard way of doing this via batch job.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Excellent! Thanks for providing your thoughts. 

It's worth mentioning here that it's possible to use key-as-segment addressing CAP, not because CAP supports OData V4 out of the box, just that CAP supports this optional alternate convention. The Northwind service at https://services.odata.org/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/ doesn't support that, but it's still an OData V4 service.

Also, I can't resist pointing out that it's "OData", not "oData" 🙂

entry.title: Error posting new HU in empty bin for PI process EWM
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I got a problem in the physical inventory process when i try to post in EWM after count process.

The error occurs for an HU that doesn't exist in the storage bin (and in SAP), but when i try to do it i got the next error:

"Error reading stock data for HU 6045BD8D37561EDDA89863E31550DB4E"

Sap error msg: /SCWM/GM755

The Header data for that HU is the next one:

And the item data is the following one:

I'm missing something to fulfill or there is problem in the system, how can i solve this?

 

Thanks,

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Dividends Elimination - Group Reporting - Public Cloud
entry.content: Hello Thank you for your response. Yes, I have checked this point but if I am not mistaken in the case of the purchase method there is no step to remove it as I see it is empty. Regards

entry.title: Remove indentation in Hierarchy SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

 Is it possible in SAC to remove indentation in hierarchies?

Thanks

entry.title: Show rows with empty dimensions values required to fix reports from BO 4.2 to BO 4.3
entry.content:
Hi

This is my first post on the SAP Community, so hopefully I have joined the correct group.

I have migrated everything from the Business Objects 4.2 to a new server with BO 4.3 using the Promotion Management Wizard. Some of the reports are showing blanks in some of the rows on one report tab and on another report tab the opposite rows have blanks.

Enabling "Show rows with empty dimensions values" on the report on BO 4.3 fixes the problem, is there a way to enable this option to all effected reports without needing to open every report and every tab to make the change?

The reports display correctly in BO 4.2 with this option disabled.

Thanks

Kenny

entry.title: Re: Lease-in accounting - migration
entry.content: Hi, we are also highly interested to get more information and guidance on migration *Lease In Accounting* for SAP Public Cloud? Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am Devender Kumar Yadav from India who holds a Chartered Financial Analyst Degree from ICFAI and a bachelor of commerce in Accounting degree.

I am working in FI module from 2016. I have developed and delivered  many SAP scripting code to automate our work.

So, I would like to learn more about SAP so that I can be developed more automation. Further I want to change my career path from end user to SAP consultant.

The digital skills initiative will help me to certify in SAP module which will enhance my professional career and open up a lot more opportunities for me.

Thanks & Regards

Devender Kumar Yadav

RISE with SAP SAP SuccessFactors Platform 

#Digitalskillinitiative

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Mechanisms for putting production order on ho...
entry.content: Trying to get away from this approach could this be done with tools as materials when floor stock is used?

entry.title: Replicate stock level from S4HANA onpremise to external system
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a requirement to replicate the stock level from the S4HANA system to an external system a few times a day. I found instructions to configure IDOC COD_STOCK_REPLICATE in a few places but not sure how to trigger this IDOC. I understand there is a specific program RCOD_STOCK_EXTRACT for C4C. Can someone please help me with this?

Kind Regards

Shantha

#stockreplication

entry.title: SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management – Localization: Innovations and Demo
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community!

This blog post brings you the latest innovations, features, and demos that show how legal requirements can spark software innovation in SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management for localization in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.

We are talking about a comprehensive solution that handles subscription and usage-based models. It provides a standardized approach to recurring billing, invoicing, tax compliance, and automation.

The product is designed to optimize global tax calculation, billing, invoicing, reporting, and payment collection, while ensuring seamless compliance. Localization ensures compliance with country/region-specific regulations by connecting core business processes.

With each release, SAP introduces localized country/region versions and new functions to assist customers with tax compliance, billing, invoicing, automation, and streamlined processes. This not only helps reduce compliance risks and costs but also improves the sustainability of tax operations.

For example, in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408, several countries/regions and functions were delivered in the product area of SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management for localization.

Additional functions that were not part of the roadmap were also delivered:

One example from public cloud release 2408 innovations is electronic invoicing in Convergent Invoicing for Türkiye.

Let me show you the process flow for outgoing eInvoice for Türkiye.

I’d like to show you also how the different scenarios are handled:

To complement, I want to provide you with a demo of electronic invoicing in Convergent Invoicing for Turkey with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance. I’ll show you how the system can adapt to specific country/region-specific regulations and streamline the invoicing process.

Electronic Invoicing in Convergent Invoicing for Türkiye

For more information, I encourage you to visit the following links:

  • Road Map Explorer: Future innovations planned 
  • SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management Localization on SAP Help Portal:  Country/Region-Specific Functions - Overview | SAP Help Portal  
  • What’s New: What's New Viewer - SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Blog Post: SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management Localization: Sustainable Compliance for Your Recurring Revenue Business

The purpose of this post is to show you how SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management for SAP S/4HANA Localization is a game-changer for businesses looking to streamline their financial operations while ensuring compliance with local regulations. Stay tuned for more updates and innovations in this space!

I hope you found this blog post interesting. If so, I invite you to follow my profile and the tags SAP Document and Reporting Compliance and SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management. Also, feel free to leave a comment or a suggestion in the comment section.

Thank you for choosing SAP to run your business complaint with local tax authorities!

entry.title: Re: Activating User Defaults in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

In EAM Area I am not able to see the Asset Management Section, I want to add the same for our users.

Rest other Sections are available but not this one. Do we need to have F1765 for calling Default values for Asset Management also? Following ur Blog we checked that ICF Node is already active.

Also I can see that the Values once saved in SU01 in Set Parameters are now appearing on Transactions e.g Create Work Order shows Plant auto filled up, but I want to have these values configured by user in FIORI - Setting area (not via Su01). but to do that the Section of Asset Management is not available, please advise.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA migration - Manufacturing Simplification List
entry.content:
Hi , 

Can someone please share the link/guide to the HANA simplification list for PP  or the steps required to convert from ECC to S4 HANA from PP point of view ? The link mentioned above is not working

entry.title: Facing issue to send the data to the receiver in a single file
entry.content:
Facing issue to send the data to the receiver in a single file after fetching the large data in chunks using pagination from S/4 Hana cloud's OData API.


Hello Experts,
 We are facing an issue with fetching large data from an OData API in small chunks using pagination.
Although the data is fetched correctly in chunks, we have observed that only the data from the last page is being passed from the local integration process to the main integration process, where we are sending the data to the SFTP receiver.

 

If we add the Receiver in the local Integration process, it is sending all the pages data to the receiver but as separate files.

 

Expectation: To send all the data in a single file to the Receiver.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Nagendra Hada

 

 

  • best practices odata
  • CPI
  • integration
  • OData
  • orchestration

entry.title: Re: BAPI for Movement 999 in WM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

To the extension for the above solution, I tried to post the FM L_TO_CREATE_SINGLE iam getting the error as ' Storage type 200 doesnot allow negative stock figures'. But in LS24 the stock is available in 200 Storage type. 
kindly do the needful.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Work Centre to Characteristic value
entry.content:
hello,

 Passing the plant and work center code combination in the OBJEK field of the INOB table, will retrieve the CUOBJ. Using the CUOBJ field in the AUSP table, will provide the characteristic value details in the ATWRT field.

entry.title: 🎉 Discover the New SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center! 🎉
entry.content:
Dear Valued Customers,

We are thrilled to share some fantastic news with you! After listening to your invaluable feedback, we have launched our redesigned SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. Our goal was to create a smoother, more intuitive experience for you, and we believe these significant improvements will do just that.

 

What’s New?

Please watch the following video where Cäcilia from the SAP Signavio Customer Success Team introduces the amazing changes:

 

Sleek, User-Friendly Layout

One of the most noticeable changes is our sleek, user-friendly layout. We wanted to make navigation easier, so you can find what you need faster and more efficiently.

 

Enhanced Webinar Overview

We have enhanced our webinar overview to provide a more comprehensive experience. You can now access all our offered onboarding webinars on a single page. This centralised approach will help you find the right resources without any hassle.

 

"Get Started with SAP" Section

In the new "Get Started with SAP" section, you can set up your SAP administrative prerequisites before diving into your products. This section is designed to help you get up and running quickly, ensuring you have everything in place from the start.

 

Product-Specific Onboarding Content

You can choose your product and delve into the onboarding content that is most relevant to you. You will also find information about RISE with SAP Signavio and the newly launched SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager. 

 

Explore Popular Assets

Our popular asset section has also been revamped. Here, you can explore customer success stories, engage with our SAP community, exchange insights with experts, and stay informed about upcoming product releases. 

 

Don’t Miss Out!

We invite you to explore these fantastic new features. Visit our redesigned SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center now and elevate your onboarding experience to the next level. We are eager to hear your feedback and committed to ensuring you have a smooth onboarding process. Please leave a comment below the blog post.

Warm regards,
Your SAP Signavio Customer Success Team

entry.title: Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release
entry.content:
The second major release of the year 2024 is here! The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release is filled with innovations that boost your productivity and support your everyday work life.

I am thrilled to give you further insights on our fully-fledged cloud ERP, supporting your journey to the intelligent, sustainable enterprise in this blog post.

If you prefer rather watching than reading, you are welcome to check out my product update video:

Figure 1: Check out my top highlights of the release in this video.

Before I start with feature-based innovations, I am proud to announce that we have generally uplifted our system availability service level agreement for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Integrated Business Planning from 99.7% to 99.9% for all our customers. This leap signals our reliability and the investments into technology, hardware, procedures, and automation that we continuously make to deliver a world-class SaaS ERP service to you. This marks another superior level of service availability and helps customers to plan business operations with greater precision at less risks. To put it into context: This cuts the upgrade downtimes by another 66%.

The new service level agreement sets a high standard for our cloud operations moving forward. 

And there’s more: Since mid-July, GROW with SAP premium subscription has expanded to include SAP Sales Cloud and Concur Expense solutions. Both enhances our Cloud ERP and gives it more horizontal width to allow customers bring more use cases onboard our solution.

And we keep the good news coming! While delivering more functional and technical based value to our public cloud customers, we reduce the complexity of monetizing digital business models by bringing contract accounting and invoicing capabilities into the core SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offering. With the 2408 release, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for contract and accounting will be part of GROW with SAP. We are giving our customers full access to the high volume, high performance and high automation invoicing, and subledger solution that focuses on service, subscriptions, pay-per-use, and multi-sided business models, without extra metering based on revenue and expenses. No action required for our existing GROW customers, the expanded functionality is included up to their licensed GROW FUEs and will automatically become available from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 for all customers.

Learn more about GROW here: https://www.sap.com/products/erp/grow.html


Figure 2: Discover the value of GROW with SAP.

We offer you even more room to GROW: Constantly updating our methodology stays important! For this release, we are excited to announce significant updates to our GROW Adoption Plan, designed to streamline and enhance the adoption process for customers and partners. By integrating new deliverables and accelerators into the GROW Adoption Plan and SAP Cloud ALM, companies can achieve a faster and more efficient implementation experience. This release features GROW Adoption Plan tagging, combining new adoption deliverables and related accelerators, including the Multi-Country Deployment and Application Lifecycle Management accelerators with new content. Additionally, our updated quality gates now include the first iteration of adoption elements, which will further integrate into SAP Cloud ALM.

Available for some time, but in between releases and therefore, potentially new to some, we are also offering our customers guidance for transitioning from the two-system-based landscape to the three-system landscape of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.


Figure 3: We are offering our customers guidance for transitioning from the two-system-based landscape to the three-system landscape of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

Also, SAP introduces new sustainability capabilities to support organizations in meeting their sustainability ambitions and goals as well as regulatory requirements. These include automated ESG reporting via the SAP Sustainability Control Tower and AI-enhanced carbon footprint calculations through the SAP Sustainability Footprint Management solution. Additionally, both solutions feature a carbon calculator engine for comprehensive emissions reporting, and the upcoming SAP Green Ledger will integrate greenhouse gas emissions into financial decision-making.

 

Speaking of artificial intelligence: A lot has happened here in the past months. With SAP’s Business AI strategy, we are defining the future by embedding SAP Business AI along our entire portfolio:

Relevant – Reliable – Responsible

Figure 4: With SAP Business AI, we accelerate your business processes and optimize decision-making.

Enough upfront news–without any further ado, let’s check out what I additionally consider as highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release.

 

Modern and Intelligent Experience

SAP User Experience

Through artificial intelligence, we help to get your work done faster and change the user experience–starting with our generative AI copilot, Joule. After a successful phased roll-out in the Early Adopter Care program, Joule will grace your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system with a continuous delivery shipment very soon, at current state of planning in quarter 3/2024. Joule works as follows: Formulate your business need in natural language and Joule will provide easy access to applications and data, lowering manual tasks and boosting productivity.

Figure 5: Our natural-language, generative AI copilot Joule provides easy access to applications and data.

 

SAP Business AI offers you a cutting-edge SAP Fiori experience via smart summarization and easy filter. Smart summarization jump starts your collaboration or follow-up by extracting the essential information of the object pages of the SAP Fiori elements applications you are using in the system. With easy filter, you can select data of “list report-based" SAP Fiori apps instead of defining filter values manually. All of this in natural language. These AI use-cases are available in beta testing. Check out the SAP Customer Influence page to sign up: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3698

Figure 6: AI-assisted smart summarization extracts the essential information of the object pages of the SAP Fiori elements apps you’re using in the system.

Figure 7: With easy filter, you can select data of “list report-based" SAP Fiori apps instead of defining filter values manually.

 

To enhance transparency around significant system changes, we’ve established a scalable communication strategy, allowing the delivery of important messages to specifically chosen customers and users, following the "need-to-know" principle. This in-app communication was highly requested by our customers and partners through advisory groups and our influence portal and permits us to spotlight essential customer activities in the system. Catering messages to such specific requirements facilitates delivering reminder information solely to those customers who haven't yet performed important requisite system activities and those users who possess the necessary authorization to carry out these tasks. A first example of this approach is the targeted communication pertaining to SAP Fiori launchpad settings, i.e., the switch to spaces and pages.

Figure 8: Target users get system pop-ups after login showing critical must-dos and must-knows for their user role including a linked document for details.

 

Finance

In finance, we introduce new review booklet for cost centers. This app provides a concise display of both actual and planned costs, organizing several predefined reports under 'Actuals' and 'Plan/Actuals' pages. It provides business applications that embed crucial insights into the relevant business context, supporting the answering of critical business queries effectively and efficiently. It seamlessly integrates application logic, guidance, and multidimensional insights and upholds the promise of "insight to action" within embedded analytics, enabling users to analyze actuals and plan data in a single report while providing the flexibility to toggle between guided views and generic slicing, dicing, and pivoting based on specific business requirements.

Figure 9: Display, analyze, and validate cost center data with the new review booklet.

Additionally, we enable you to analyze and summarize data from the cost-center review booklet into actionable financial business insights with the help of generative AI. This use case is available in beta testing. Check out the SAP Customer Influence page to sign up: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3698

Figure 10: Gain financial business insights with the help of generative AI.

 

GRC, Trade, and Tax

This release delivers an innovative experience in managing US-internal tax configuration powered by Joule. The process of maintaining tax jurisdiction codes and rates has been simplified from a dozen steps to only three! Users just can use a natural language prompt to retrieve detailed information from the AI, then verify, simulate, and save the configured tax jurisdiction codes and rates. Once the connection between your SAP system and the LLM is configured, users can chat directly with the AI to retrieve detailed address-based tax jurisdiction information. Furthermore, the LLM delivers links to the respective state tax or revenue authority, providing users with an easily accessible way to verify their tax rate information prior to simulating and saving the changes. This use case is currently available in beta testing. To register, check out the SAP Customer Influence page: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3698

Figure 11: Joule helps to simplify the process of maintaining US-internal tax configuration.

 

Sales

One of the key highlights here is the auto-activation of the intelligent scenario for input recommendations for sales orders. This feature significantly boosts efficiency and cost savings by hastening the activation of the intelligent scenario for sales order recommendations. Implemented when scope item 73P gets activated, the system employs an auto-training mechanism that periodically trains the machine learning model based on the business data from the past year. Users have the flexibility to enable or disable this auto-training in the ‘Intelligent Scenario Management’ app. This functionality guarantees automatic set-up, training and operation of the intelligent scenario, making the sales order completion more efficient and intuitive while reducing costs.

Figure 12: Auto-activation of the intelligent scenario for input recommendations makes the sales-orders process more efficient and intuitive.

 

Product Compliance

With this release, we enable the generation of product compliance documents with integration into the safety data sheet process. Users can now generate a first selection of sections of an EU safety data sheet (without country/region-specific additions) for product compliance solutions using Adobe Document Services. This not only extends the product compliance solution with integrated document generation capability but also streamlines the generation of documents for product compliance data. This is based on versatile Adobe form templates and form data providers. The generated documents are seamlessly integrated into the safety data sheet process. This also comes with new apps to manage and release data for handling and storage as well as stability and reactivity of products, making it a comprehensive tool for product compliance.

Figure 13: You can now easily generate a first selection of sections of an EU safety data sheet using Adobe Document Services.

 

ERP Innovations

Manufacturing

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 introduces advancements in the ‘Monitor Material Coverage’ SAP Fiori apps. The ‘Monitor Material Coverage – Net Segments’ and the ‘Monitor Material Coverage – Net and Individual Segments’ apps now offer additional columns displaying the number of rescheduling proposals for a material. This improvement assists businesses in avoiding supply shortages or an excess of supplies. This is achieved by indicating the number of Material Requirements Planning (MRP) supplying elements with rescheduling proposals for each material. Additionally, the system can reschedule in, reschedule out, or cancel a process based upon a calculation for the entire planning horizon. The enhanced features enable better management of supply shortages and excess supply with MRP material coverage apps, providing a more effective and streamlined operation.

Figure 14: Manage supply shortages or excess supply with additional columns in the ‘Monitor Material Coverage’ SAP Fiori apps.

 

Supply Chain Management

In this release, we ship the warehouse-driven split of the outbound delivery order. This feature empowers organizations to separate packed and unpacked items, quantities, or handling units from an existing outbound delivery order into a new one. This offers increased flexibility in case a complete picking is not possible, added functionality if space in the truck is limited, and the ability to split outbound delivery order items for which no warehouse task has been created yet. It’s also possible to split handling units into a new outbound delivery order. The release therefore provides businesses with improved logistical abilities, offering greater adaptability in managing outbound delivery orders.

Figure 15: The warehouse-driven split of the outbound delivery order empower organizations to separate packed and unpacked items, quantities, or handling units from an existing outbound delivery order into a new one.

 

Solution and Subscription Business

Here, I want to highlight a feature from the latest CFD release which I believe has huge business value for organizations transitioning to solution-led business models. The introduction of advanced solution bundling enables you to pre-configure complex solution orders which can contain multiple configurable and non-configurable items, and sell them on a single solution order, providing greater flexibility whilst saving effort on manual input. This enables the sale of complex end-to-end solution offerings tailored to specific customer needs.

Figure 16: Pre-configured bundles can be added to a solution order and processed for further fulfilment.

 

Service

In this release, we enable you to add maintenance plan templates in service contracts. This enhancement simplifies the workflow drastically, particularly for those dealing with service contracts that include maintenance plans. During the creation process of service contract templates, you can already add maintenance plan templates to service contract items. After creating a service contract from a service contract template, the maintenance plan templates are also copied. When you release a service contract item, a new maintenance plan is automatically created using the maintenance plan template. If you don’t use service contract templates, you can add maintenance plan templates directly in a service contract.

Figure 17: Maintenance plan templates facilitate the service contract process significantly.

 

Enterprise Porfolio and Project Management

To better support the engineer-to-order process, we ship an innovation to reserve materials using project demand. When it comes to project demands, we offer three categories: resources, services, and materials. In the category of materials, we now offer ‘Project Stock Reservation’. A project procurement controller or project manager can select the WBS element, the plant, the material ID, the quantity, and eventually also the storage location, and then reserve material for a project on a certain date. Once the demand is requested, a reservation number gets generated. With the monitoring capabilities, you can view how many quantities have been delivered in case certain quantities in stock are issued against the material. This creates transparency for the project procurement controller.

Figure 18: The ability to reserve material using project demand makes workflows more efficient and project management more effective.

 

Professional Services

The shared risk-based revenue recognition for professional service projects feature addresses potential customer projects that exceed the initial scope, allowing service providers to bill at regular rates before charging reduced rates for any additional work. A new revenue recognition key (SPTMSR) supports this shared risk model. This enables more precise revenue recognition where additional work is required, increasing flexibility for revenue recognition and reducing manual efforts to adjust accrued revenues. In this model, if the need for additional work is identified, the system considers the reduced rate during revenue recognition. The feature signifies an important step towards enhancing accounting accuracy and transparency in service-oriented sectors, promoting mitigation of financial risk, and improving overall project management.

Figure 19: Shared risk-based revenue recognition for professional service projects enhances accuracy and transparency.

 

Sourcing and Procurement

A purchase contract is an agreement between a buyer and a supplier with agreed pricing, quantity, terms, and conditions. Since purchase contracts are long-term documents, they are subject to change over time. By enabling versioning of purchase contracts, businesses can meticulously track various versions of contracts each time a modification is made to an active purchase contract. Following alterations to fields set for versioning, the system automatically creates a new version. The new version can then become an active document, subject to the approval process. The versioning feature enhances transparency and efficiency by enabling comparisons between two document versions, including changes notable in pricing. This function ultimately aids in fostering improved collaboration between buyers and suppliers.

Figure 20: Versioning in purchase contracts fosters improved collaboration between buyers and suppliers.

 

Asset Management

In this release, we introduce an enhanced feature of recording the "As-Found" condition in the 'Perform Maintenance Jobs' app. The app offers maintenance technicians an improved way to record the initial condition of an asset during proactive and routine maintenance jobs, even when the maintenance order does not have a maintenance notification assigned. If the specific technical object differs from the overall order header, a new notification will be created automatically while the technician records the "As-Found" condition. Previously, the malfunction data tab was enabled only if the order has an associated notification. Now, these tabs are accessible by default in orders with notifications. Additionally, configurations can allow users to maintain malfunction data, thereby providing users with better recording of asset reliability data which in turn enhances the overall user experience.

Figure 21: We enhance the recording of the “As-Found” condition in the ‘Perform Maintenance Jobs’ app.

 

Environment, Health, and Safety

A new application for managing the investigation process significantly improves the tracking and oversight of investigation projects, allowing for more effective and efficient processes. The ‘Manage Investigations’ app offers a comprehensive platform where pertinent details such as investigation phase, persons involved, and timelines can be meticulously documented and managed. Administrators can determine the course and progression of investigations, and delegate necessary tasks for seamless operation. This new tool pursues both procedural integrity and simplicity, with a user-friendly interface coupled with robust functionality. Ultimately, it enhances user experience, strengthens accountability, and fosters greater efficiency in managing the investigation process.

Figure 22: The new ‘Manage Investigations’ app fosters great efficiency in managing the investigation process.

 

Two-Tier ERP

In two-tier ERP, Tier 1 acts as an original equipment manufacturer on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and Tier 2 acts as a service subsidiary on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.  With this set up, organizations can perform claims processing and subsequent reimbursements between their service organization and original equipment manufacturer. In this release, we introduce a refined warranty claim process, aiding you in effectively managing and navigating through the complexities of warranty claims. The process offers improved visibility into various aspects such as claim creation, processing, submission, and tracking. In addition, the solution accelerates assessment and administration of warranty claims with built-in automation that streamlines the end-to-end warranty management. As a part of service management, this efficient mechanism ensures quicker resolution time, reducing both manual effort and the overall operating cost for the business. Essentially, the enhancement in the warranty claim process signifies an evolution towards improved customer satisfaction and a more strategic approach to service operations.

Figure 23: The new warranty claim process offers improved customer satisfaction and a more strategic approach to service operations.

 

SaaS Foundation

Extensibility

The cloud extensibility model with a three-system landscape in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition enables customers to seamlessly leverage SAP innovations, resulting in future-proof extensions that are compliant throughout their lifecycle and do not require adjustments during cloud innovation cycles. With this model, we can develop cloud-ready business apps, services, or custom extensions that are both upgrade-stable and cloud-ready. With developer extensibility, as a customer or partner, you can use one-off delivery for ABAP development intended to remain within your SAP S/4HANA Cloud landscape which enables you to import the developed custom ABAP code in a three-system landscape into the test and production system of the current landscape.

With multi-off delivery, we take it a step further. Custom development can be performed by a partner on behalf of a customer, in a separate development system which is not connected to the customer landscape, and then deployed on the customer's three-system landscape using the ‘Git-Enabled Change and Transport System’ (gCTS). The source code of ABAP extensions is stored in remote Git repositories, with gCTS being used to transfer (push and pull) the ABAP custom code between SAP S/4HANA Cloud landscapes and Git repositories. This is especially useful for scenarios where source and target landscapes can't be connected via transport routes. The SAP Fiori app ‘Git-Enabled CTS (gCTS)’ helps to manage tasks such as connecting to remote Git repositories, pushing and pulling commits, and managing branches. Commits are created in the development environment using ABAP development tools for Eclipse (ADT) when a task of a transport request is released. Find more information here.

 

Figures 24 & 25: Multi-off delivery brings a multitude of possibilities for custom development.

 

Public Sector Management

Public sector functionality within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is broadening in terms of geographical availability. In addition to the US, Canada, and Germany, services such as grants management, budget management, and fund accounting is now also available in the UK, the Netherlands, and Australia. The global deployment of our service has started and is gaining great momentum. Be prepared for the availability in additional countries by the year 2025.

Additionally, we bring new, comprehensive budget management functionalities:

  • Addition of a Substitution Tool for Budget Maintenance.
  • Enhancement allowing the consumption of budget for expected expenses rather than the posting date.
  • Feature to check Public Sector budget availability using project hierarchies.
  • Updates to facilitate the generation of budget documents.
  • Improved reporting on budgets versus payments and open invoices.

Figure 26: This release includes significant updates to the early release enablement cycle for public sector.

 

R&D Engineering

In this release, we ship the integration of CAD design for data and file management. With this SAP Product Lifecycle Management solution, seamless interaction between engineering designs and SAP business processes is now feasible, i.e., you can easily transfer engineering bills of material (EBOMs) from the SAP Product Lifecycle Management solution and continue to work on them as manufacturing bills of material (MBOMs) in the relevant ‘Maintain Bill of Material (Version 2)’ app. The CAD tools extend their capabilities by being able to store files in the SAP PLM Product Data Integration (PDI), leading to the development of an Enterprise Product Structure within SAP’s Product Lifecycle Management. This integration simplifies the transfer of product data via product handover to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, reducing the number of interfaces and facilitating a smoother operation. The end result is higher efficiency in engineering processes, holistic product description for increased transparency, and reduced operating costs. Overall, it signifies a major stride towards optimizing product data management in industry-specific CAD applications.

Figure 27: The integration of CAD design for data and file management enhances your engineering processes.

 

Business Partner Data

This release presents an enhancement in data privacy management, allowing users to concurrently assign data controllers along with specific purposes to business partners. This upgrade significantly bolsters the concept of “privacy by design and default” by permitting users the flexibility to manually or automatically attach data controllers to business partners. With options to leverage this feature via the ‘Maintain Business Partner’ and ‘Manage Business Partner’ SAP Fiori apps or through API channels, businesses can effectively manage their partner master data. This advancement not only ensures timely compliance with stringent data protection regulations but also molds business processes to instill trust among partners and customers. By enhancing the data privacy landscape, this feature equips businesses with the edge to meet legal requirements and foster a venerable relationship with their customers.

Figure 28: You can now assign data controllers along with specific purposes to business partners.

 

Information Lifecycle Management

SAP Information Lifecycle Management (SAP ILM) allows users to manage the lifecycle of live and archived data. Users can set rules for managing data throughout its lifecycle, specifying how long it should stay in the database, how long it should be archived, and when it should be deleted. This can be done consistently across development, test, and production systems. With the 2408 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, one key feature is the self-service configuration user interface (SSCUI). This tool allows users to centrally maintain SAP ILM settings and transport them across the system landscape i.e., development, test and production systems, reducing the risk of errors and inconsistencies. Another key feature with this release is the storage of archive files to SAP HANA Cloud data lake files, ensuring fast and efficient access to archived data. Previously, these files were stored in the Neo platform. This change helps to store the SAP ILM archive files on a future-proof, fast, and cost-efficient technology stack, supporting both SAP ILM use cases: data volume management and data privacy. This change exclusively affects the underlying technology stack, with no impact on usability.

You can find more information here.

 

Figures 29 & 30: SAP Information Lifecycle Management (SAP ILM) allows users to manage the lifecycle of live and archived data.

 

Identity and Access Management

Unlock the full potential of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the unified access to documentation about Identity and Access Management (IAM) on SAP Help Portal! With this, we provide a simplified, one-stop shop for all IAM-related documentation, making it easier for users to access everything you need to know about user and identity management, roles, authorization, and authentication. The documentation covers all IAM-related tasks in the different phases of implementation (prepare, realize, run, and upgrade) making the process more streamlined and efficient. This unified access to IAM documentation provides a holistic view on IAM for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and integrated products from initial system access to tasks which need to be completed before, during, and after upgrading SAP S/4HANA Cloud and allows you to familiarize yourself with its key concepts. 

Figure 31: Check out the documentation about Identity and Access Management on SAP Help Portal.

 

Summary

You see, the world is turning fast, and we keep you at the forefront of progress–but these are by far not all innovations we have in store with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408. Stay tuned for the individual blog posts diving deeper into selected lines of business and industries. 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn to not miss the next update.

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime.

🔎Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Easy access to your SAP Easy Access Menu via App Finder
entry.content: What about adding a feature to start the SAP Easy Access Menu without passing through the App Finder and instead just presenting the complete menu clicking on a Tile ? SAP GUI for HTML could also be acceptable to make the Fiori LaunchPad a better friend of SAP GUI .

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
Re: SBPA - Stopping an automation for a day
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski ,
Yes, i can use wait but is it a good approach to use wait to stop the automation for a day.
Thanks,
Keerthana

entry.title: secondary DB is not connecting on HANA studio 2.0, but primary & hana replication is working fine
entry.content:
secondary DB is not connecting on HANA studio 2.0 sps5, but primary & hana system replication is working fine.

i am just trying to connect to the secondary DB on Hana studio 2.0-
